en.extract:
The Sulawesi drongo (Dicrurus montanus) is a species of bird in the family Dicruridae. It is endemic to Sulawesi in Indonesia. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests.

The '''Sulawesi drongo''' ('''''Dicrurus montanus''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Dicruridae]]. It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to [[Sulawesi]] in [[Indonesia]]. Its natural [[habitat]]s are subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s and subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]]s.
